project_identity.name: GhostMail
project_identity.core_philosophy: Functionality over Form. Stealth over Shine. The interface should feel like a CLI tool running in a browser.

rules: Use ALL CAPS for headers and labels to mimic military/system interfaces.
Text should often look like it's being 'typed' out (typing animation).

usage_rules: Backgrounds must be almost pitch black.
Text color should default to 'neon-green' or 'gray-300' depending on hierarchy.
Use 'neon-pink' strictly for Errors or Destructive actions.
Borders are critical. Use 1px borders with 'border-neon-green/30' to define areas.

decorations.name: Scanlines
decorations.css: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; pointer-events: none;

buttons.default: bg-transparent border border-neon-green text-neon-green hover:bg-neon-green hover:text-black rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-75
buttons.primary: bg-neon-green text-black font-bold uppercase hover:bg-white hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.5)] rounded-none
buttons.destructive: border border-neon-pink text-neon-pink hover:bg-neon-pink hover:text-white rounded-none

cards.style: bg-cyber-gray/90 border border-neon-green/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-none relative
cards.header_style: border-b border-neon-green/20 bg-neon-green/5 p-2 flex justify-between items-center

inputs.style: bg-black border-b border-neon-green/50 focus:border-neon-green text-neon-green placeholder:text-neon-green/30 outline-none rounded-none px-2 py-2 font-mono

layout_wrappers.main_container: min-h-screen bg-cyber-black text-neon-green font-mono relative overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-neon-green selection:text-black

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use CSS Grid with explicit lines. Think 'Dashboard' or 'Cockpit'.
layout_strategy.spacing: Compact. Use 'gap-2' or 'gap-4'. Terminals are dense.
layout_strategy.containers: Everything lives in a 'Window' or a 'Panel'. No floating text.

types: Instant transitions (0s or 75ms). No smooth 500ms fades. Machines are fast.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use rounded corners > 2px. Sharp edges only.
Avoid gradients unless it's a 'scanline' or 'grid' effect.
The UI should look like it could run on a CRT monitor.
